name: Adv. Meera Joshi
bio: Expert in criminal defense with 12+ years of courtroom experience. Handled 500+ cases ranging from bail hearings to complex criminal trials across Maharashtra High Court.
education: LLB, Mumbai University; LLM, NLSIU Bangalore

name: Adv. Rohan Desai
bio: Specializes in real estate disputes, property documentation, RERA matters, and land acquisition cases. Has successfully represented clients in Bombay High Court.

name: Adv. Kavita Nair
bio: Senior criminal advocate with extensive experience in Madras High Court. Known for aggressive defense strategies and high acquittal rate in criminal matters.
education: LLB, Tamil Nadu Dr. Ambedkar Law University

name: Adv. Suresh Menon
bio: Kerala-based property law expert handling land disputes, apartment legal issues, and property registration matters. Fluent in complex Kerala land tenure laws.

name: Adv. Priyanka Rao
bio: Corporate and startup law specialist. Handles company formations, shareholder agreements, SEBI compliance, and M&A transactions. Empaneled with multiple Fortune 500 companies.
education: LLB, Campus Law Centre DU; LLM, NLU Delhi

name: Adv. Nita Shah
bio: Compassionate family law specialist with expertise in divorce, child custody, alimony, and domestic violence cases. Has represented 1000+ clients with sensitivity and expertise.

name: Adv. Arun Kapoor
bio: Labour and employment law expert specializing in wrongful termination, PF/ESI disputes, industrial disputes, and employee rights. Has argued before the Supreme Court of India.

name: Adv. Lakshmi Iyer
bio: Family and matrimonial law practitioner. Specializes in divorce mediation, NRI matrimonial disputes, and child adoption cases. Known for amicable settlement approach.

name: Adv. Deepak Verma
bio: Seasoned corporate lawyer handling mergers & acquisitions, IPO compliance, venture capital transactions, and dispute resolution. Trusted advisor to 50+ startups and enterprises.
education: LLB, Osmania University; LLM, Harvard Law School

name: Adv. Ananya Bose
bio: Young and dynamic criminal lawyer specializing in bail applications, anticipatory bail, and trial advocacy. Committed to client rights and speedy justice.

name: Adv. Fixed User
bio: Corporate legal advisor with extensive experience in contract drafting and business compliance.
